description:
A simple GUI front-end for OpenSSH for Windows, Linux and Mac!

Discover OpenSSH-GUI, an intuitive graphical interface for OpenSSH, designed for Windows, Linux, and Mac users. Built entirely in C#, this open-source tool simplifies managing SSH connections, keys, and configurations.
What's Changed
- Release V3.2.2 by @frequency403 in #33
Full Changelog: v3.2.1...v3.2.2
